title: Danny Ng: If Iran accepts ceasefire, US and Israel will attack again or seize their oil
description: 回复 MarioNawfal: Either you are naive or just delusional. Do you really think that if Iran accepts a ceasefire, the US and Israel will not attack and try to overthrow the Iranian regime again — or even attempt to seize their oil?

title: Kobeissi Letter BREAKING: Oil prices crossing above $115/barrel. CPI inflation to rise to 3.7% if sustained 7 weeks
description: Oil prices are now crossing above $115/barrel in the US. Our models indicate that if current levels are sustained another ~7 weeks, US CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7%. This would put US inflation at its highest level since September 2023.
